commands.description: List CloudWatch alarms

commands.command: aws cloudwatch put-metric-alarm --alarm-name myAlarm --metric-name CPUUtilization --namespace AWS/EC2 --statistic Average --period 300 --threshold 70 --comparison-operator GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold --dimensions Name=InstanceId,Value=i-1234567890abcdef0 --evaluation-periods 2 --alarm-actions arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:123456789012:my-sns-topic
commands.description: Put a metric alarm
Delete a CloudWatch alarm

commands.command: aws s3api list-objects-v2 --bucket my-bucket --query 'Contents[?Size > `1048576'].{Key: Key, Size: Size}' --output table
commands.description: Advanced S3 filtering: Uses the S3API and JMESPath queries to list only files larger than 1MB in a formatted table, useful for finding large storage consumers.
Performance/Reporting: Quickly extracts a lightweight text-based summary of all instance IDs, states, and types, bypassing the heavy JSON overhead for quick audits.
Workflow optimization: Retrieves only the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of a specific user, which is essential for piping into subsequent automation scripts or policy attachments.
Config Management: Directly modifies the AWS config file via CLI to switch default regions without entering the interactive setup wizard.

commands.command: aws cloudwatch get-metric-statistics --namespace AWS/EC2 --metric-name CPUUtilization --dimensions Name=InstanceId,Value=i-1234567890abcdef0 --start-time 2023-01-01T00:00:00Z --end-time 2023-01-01T23:59:59Z --period 3600 --statistics Average
commands.description: Debugging/Analysis: Retrieves historical metric data points for a specific time range, allowing engineers to debug performance spikes via the CLI.
